response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack web engineer with deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise, but the role demands a senior C++ specialist with industrial automation and cybersecurity experience. His C++ exposure is limited to a single 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a university thesis project; C++ does not even appear in his listed skills. He has no background in industrial protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus), no IEC 62443 or SDL experience, and no industrial or IoT domain knowledge — all of which are core to this position.
strengths: Demonstrated event-driven architecture experience (GISCollective platform, Dunnhumby micro-services handling millions of requests/second)
Broad polyglot background with exposure to low-latency systems, concurrency (async I/O, fibers in DLang), and distributed systems
Strong software craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, pair programming, mentoring, and community knowledge-sharing
concerns: C++ is essentially absent from his career: one 6-month role in 2011–2015 and a thesis project; STL, multi-threading, and OOP in C++ are undemonstrated at any meaningful scale
Zero exposure to industrial cybersecurity, IEC 62443-4-1, SDL practices, or industrial communication protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus, IEC 61850)
No industrial automation, embedded systems (beyond a brief robotics mention), or IoT domain experience relevant to the manufacturing/automation context of this role
